glosses.zh-Hans: 收音机 (设备); 广播 (播放)
glosses.yue: 收音機 (裝置); 廣播 (播放)
glosses.ja: ラジオ (機器); ラジオ (放送)

translations.en: Please turn on the radio in the living room.
translations.es: Por favor, enciende la radio en la sala de estar.
translations.fr: Veuillez allumer la radio dans le salon.
translations.de: Bitte schalte das Radio im Wohnzimmer ein.
translations.it: Per favore, accendi la radio in soggiorno.
translations.pt: Por favor, ligue o rádio na sala de estar.
translations.vi: Vui lòng bật radio ở phòng khách.
translations.ar: من فضلك شغّل الراديو في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: Zet alsjeblieft de radio in de woonkamer aan.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, увімкни радіо в вітальні.
translations.hu: Kérlek, kapcsold be a rádiót a nappaliban.
translations.hi: कृपया बैठक कक्ष में रेडियो चालू करें।
translations.el: Παρακαλώ άνοιξε το ραδιόφωνο στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Vennligst slå på radioen i stuen.
translations.id: Tolong nyalakan radio di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Vänligen slå på radion i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Te rog, pornește radioul din camera de zi.
translations.cs: Prosím, zapni rádio v obývacím pokoji.
translations.da: Venligst tænd for radioen i stuen.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja laita radio päälle olohuoneessa.
translations.ja: リビングのラジオをつけてください。

tokens.explanation: noun '거실' (living room) with locative particle '-에서' indicating location
noun '라디오' (radio) with accusative particle '-를' marking the direct object
verb stem '켜다' (to turn on) in imperative form
auxiliary verb '주다' used in polite request form '-주세요'

translations.en: Good music is playing on the radio.
translations.es: Está sonando buena música en la radio.
translations.fr: Il passe de la bonne musique à la radio.
translations.it: Sta passando buona musica alla radio.
translations.zh-Hans: 收音机里正在播放好音乐。
translations.yue: 收音機度而家播緊好音樂。
translations.ru: По радио сейчас играет хорошая музыка.
translations.pt: Está tocando boa música no rádio.
translations.vi: Nhạc hay đang phát trên radio.
translations.nl: Er speelt goede muziek op de radio.
translations.uk: По радіо зараз грає хороша музика.
translations.hi: रेडियो पर अच्छा संगीत बज रहा है।
translations.nb: Det spilles god musikk på radioen.
translations.id: Di radio sedang diputar musik yang bagus.
translations.sv: Det spelas bra musik på radion.
translations.ro: La radio se aude muzică bună.
translations.da: Der spilles god musik på radioen.
translations.ja: ラジオで良い音楽が流れている。

tokens.explanation: noun '라디오' (radio) with source/location particle '-에서'
adjective '좋다' (to be good) in attributive form modifying '음악'
noun '음악' (music) with nominative particle '-이' marking the subject
verb '나오다' (to come out, play) in polite present tense

translations.en: I like the radio at the cafe.
translations.es: Me gusta la radio del café.
translations.de: Ich mag das Radio im Café.
translations.it: Mi piace la radio del caffè.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢咖啡馆的收音机。
translations.yue: 我鍾意咖啡店嘅收音機。
translations.he: אני אוהב את הרדיו בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Tôi thích radio ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Ik hou van de radio in het café.
translations.hi: मुझे कैफे का रेडियो पसंद है।
translations.el: Μου αρέσει το ραδιόφωνο στο καφέ.
translations.ro: Îmi place radioul de la cafenea.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide radioen på caféen.
translations.ja: カフェのラジオが好きです。

tokens.explanation: noun '카페' (café) with locative particle '-에서' indicating place
first-person pronoun '저' with topic particle '-는'
noun '라디오' with accusative particle '-를' marking the object
verb '좋아하다' (to like) in polite present tense

translations.en: Let's go for a walk while listening to the radio together.
translations.es: Vamos a dar un paseo mientras escuchamos la radio juntos.
translations.fr: Allons nous promener en écoutant la radio ensemble.
translations.de: Lass uns zusammen spazieren gehen und dabei Radio hören.
translations.it: Andiamo a fare una passeggiata ascoltando la radio insieme.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们一起一边听收音机一边散步吧。
translations.yue: 我哋一齊邊聽收音機邊散步啦。
translations.ru: Давай вместе пойдём на прогулку и послушаем радио.
translations.pt: Vamos dar um passeio enquanto ouvimos rádio juntos.
translations.he: בואו נצא לטיול יחד ונקשיב לרדיו.
translations.tr: Birlikte yürüyüşe çıkalım ve radyo dinleyelim.
translations.vi: Hãy cùng đi dạo trong khi nghe radio.
translations.ar: هيا نذهب في نزهة معًا ونستمع إلى الراديو.
translations.nl: Laten we samen wandelen terwijl we naar de radio luisteren.
translations.uk: Ходімо разом на прогулянку й послухаємо радіо.
translations.hu: Menjünk együtt sétálni, miközben rádiót hallgatunk.
translations.hi: आइए साथ में रेडियो सुनते हुए टहलने चलें।
translations.pl: Chodźmy na spacer, słuchając razem radia.
translations.el: Ας πάμε μια βόλτα ενώ ακούμε μαζί ραδιόφωνο.
translations.nb: La oss gå en tur mens vi lytter til radio sammen.
translations.id: Ayo jalan-jalan sambil mendengarkan radio bersama.
translations.sv: Låt oss gå en promenad medan vi lyssnar på radion tillsammans.
translations.ro: Hai să mergem la plimbare în timp ce ascultăm radio împreună.
translations.cs: Pojďme se jít projít a poslouchat rádio spolu.
translations.da: Lad os gå en tur, mens vi lytter til radio sammen.
translations.fi: Mennään ulos kävelylle ja kuunnellaan yhdessä radiota.
translations.ja: 一緒にラジオを聞きながら散歩しましょう。

tokens.explanation: adverb '같이' (together)
noun '라디오' with accusative particle '-를' marking the object
verb '듣다' (to listen) in connective form '-으며' indicating simultaneous action
verb '산책하다' (to take a walk) in hortative 'let's' form

en: Please turn on the radio in the living room.
Good music is playing on the radio.
I like the radio at the cafe.
Let's go for a walk while listening to the radio together.

noun '라디오' (radio) with accusative particle '-를' marking the direct object
verb stem '켜다' (to turn on) in imperative form
auxiliary verb '주다' used in polite request form '-주세요'
noun '라디오' (radio) with source/location particle '-에서'
adjective '좋다' (to be good) in attributive form modifying '음악'
noun '음악' (music) with nominative particle '-이' marking the subject
verb '나오다' (to come out, play) in polite present tense
noun '카페' (café) with locative particle '-에서' indicating place
first-person pronoun '저' with topic particle '-는'
noun '라디오' with accusative particle '-를' marking the object
verb '좋아하다' (to like) in polite present tense

noun '라디오' with accusative particle '-를' marking the object
verb '듣다' (to listen) in connective form '-으며' indicating simultaneous action
verb '산책하다' (to take a walk) in hortative 'let's' form
